name: healthcare-ai-governance
description: MEOK AI Labs — Healthcare AI Governance. FDA SaMD classification, HIPAA compliance, WHO health AI ethics, clinical decision support.

tools.name: classify_samd
tools.description: Classify AI/ML Software as Medical Device (SaMD) per FDA framework.

tools.name: check_cds_exemption
tools.description: Check if Clinical Decision Support AI qualifies for FDA CDS exemption.

tools.name: hipaa_ai_check
tools.description: Check HIPAA compliance for AI systems processing health data.

tools.name: who_health_ai_ethics
tools.description: Evaluate against WHO's 6 principles for health AI ethics.

tools.name: dual_compliance_check
tools.description: Check dual FDA + EU AI Act compliance for medical AI devices.
